name: llm-guard-kit
summary: Real-time reliability monitoring for LLM agents. v0.10.0: NVIDIA NIM backend (llama-3.1-70b judge + 8b P(True)), backend A/B tracking with compare_backends(), automatic Anthropic↔NIM fallback. v0.9.0: cross-domain scoring via P(True) ensemble (AUROC ~0.78) and structural LogReg (AUROC ~0.73). v0.8.0: GuardClient SDK, CISC, signed A2A trust objects, stream_guard, mesh routing.
author: Avighan Majumder
